# Christoferson Chua — christoferson.github.io

> Innovative Software Architect and Developer with 20+ years of expertise,
> specializing in Cloud-Native Solutions and emerging technologies.
> Combining deep Java development background (12+ years) with advanced AWS
> cloud architecture (4+ years) and cutting-edge Generative AI implementations.

- **Website:** https://christoferson.github.io/
- **About:** https://christoferson.github.io/about.html
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/christoferson
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/christofersonchua/

---

## About Christoferson Chua

Software Developer | Cloud Architect | AI/ML Engineer

Proven track record of architecting scalable, resilient systems that drive
digital transformation. Demonstrated success in leveraging AI/ML technologies
to create innovative solutions while ensuring robust, enterprise-grade
deployments. Known for translating complex technical requirements into
practical, business-focused solutions that enhance operational efficiency
and drive competitive advantage.

---

## Education

- **Bachelor of Science in Computer Science - Computer Engineering**
  De La Salle University, Manila — Graduated August 30, 2003

## AWS Certifications

Total: 12 AWS Certifications across all levels (Foundational, Associate,
Professional, Specialty). AWS Certification Journey spanning 4 years, 4 months
(January 2021 – May 2025).

### Professional Level

- **AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional**
  Issued: March 23, 2024 | Valid: Mar 2024 – Mar 2027

## Projects Overview

Full project listing: https://christoferson.github.io/

### AI Agents & Agentic Workflows

- [streamlit-strands-agent](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-strands-agent): Streamlit application demonstrating AWS Strands Agents framework. Tags: AI Agents, Streamlit, AWS
- [mcp_demo](https://github.com/christoferson/mcp_demo): Model Context Protocol (MCP) demonstration and examples. Tags: AI, Python, MCP
- [aws-bedrock-agentcore](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-bedrock-agentcore): AWS Bedrock Agent Core implementation and utilities. Tags: AI Agents, AWS Bedrock, Python
- [aws-strands-agents](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-strands-agents): AWS Strands Agents - Multi-agent orchestration framework. Tags: AI Agents, AWS, Python

### Generative AI — AWS Bedrock

- [aws-bedrock](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-bedrock): AWS Bedrock demos and examples. Tags: AI, AWS Bedrock, Python
- [chainlit-bedrock-base](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-base): Foundation for Chainlit chat apps using AWS Bedrock.
- [chainlit-bedrock-agent](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-agent): Chainlit integration with Bedrock Agents.
- [chainlit-bedrock-kb](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-kb): Chainlit + Bedrock Knowledge Base integration.
- [chainlit-bedrock-kb-lc](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-kb-lc): Chainlit Bedrock Knowledge Base + LangChain.
- [chainlit-bedrock-lc](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-lc): Chainlit Bedrock with LangChain.
- [chainlit-bedrock-llm](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-llm): Chainlit Bedrock LLM integration.
- [chainlit-bedrock-llm-kb](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-llm-kb): Chainlit + Bedrock LLM with Knowledge Base (RAG).
- [chainlit-bedrock-sdxl](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-bedrock-sdxl): Chainlit Stable Diffusion XL image generation.
- [streamlit-bedrock-llm](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-bedrock-llm): Streamlit + Bedrock LLM integration.
- [react-chat-avatar-voice](https://github.com/christoferson/react-chat-avatar-voice): React frontend with Bedrock - Chat with Avatar & Voice.
- [langchain-python](https://github.com/christoferson/langchain-python): LangChain Python examples and implementations.

### Streamlit & UI Frameworks

- [streamlit-demo](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-demo): Streamlit Demo - Latest version.
- [streamlit-demo-202406](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-demo-202406): Streamlit Demo v1.36 - June 2024.
- [streamlit-demo-202408](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-demo-202408): Streamlit Demo - August 2024.
- [streamlit-component-blank](https://github.com/christoferson/streamlit-component-blank): Streamlit Custom Component template.
- [chainlit-202409](https://github.com/christoferson/chainlit-202409): Chainlit v1.1.401 - September 2024.

### AWS CloudFormation

- [aws-cloudformation](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-cloudformation): Comprehensive AWS CloudFormation templates collection.

### Java — Servers

- [java-server-javalin](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-javalin): Java Server using Javalin.
- [java-server-spring-boot](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-spring-boot): Java Server using Spring Boot.
- [java-server-helidon](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-helidon): Java Server using Helidon.
- [java-server-micronaut](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-micronaut): Java Server using Micronaut.
- [java-server-microprofile](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-microprofile): Java Server using MicroProfile.
- [java-server-blank](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-blank): Java Server using Core Java Sockets.
- [java-server-quarkus](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-quarkus): Java Server using Quarkus.
- [java-server-quarkus-jpa](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-quarkus-jpa): Java Server using Quarkus with JPA.
- [java-server-quarkus-spring](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-quarkus-spring): Java Server using Quarkus with Spring Compatibility.
- [java-server-quarkus-panache](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-quarkus-panache): Java Server using Quarkus with Panache.
- [java-server-quarkus-websocket](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-quarkus-websocket): Java Server Quarkus WebSocket.
- [java-server-spring-websocket](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-spring-websocket): Java Server Spring WebSocket.
- [java-server-spring-http2](https://github.com/christoferson/java-server-spring-http2): Java Server Spring HTTP2.

### Java — Standard Releases

- [java-release-25](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-25): Java 25 - Latest features.
- [java-release-24](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-24): Java 24 features.
- [java-release-23](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-23): Java 23 features.
- [java-release-21](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-21): Java 21 LTS features.
- [java-release-20](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-20): Java 20 features.
- [java-release-19](https://github.com/christoferson/java-release-19): Java 19 features.
- [java-scratch-pad](https://github.com/christoferson/java-scratch-pad): Java Scratch Pad / Playground.

### Java — Features

- [java-feature-record](https://github.com/christoferson/java-feature-record): Java Records (JEP-359, JEP-395).
- [java-feature-default-methods](https://github.com/christoferson/java-feature-default-methods): Java Default Methods.

### Spring — Spring Boot

- [spring-boot-2x](https://github.com/christoferson/spring-boot-2x): Spring Boot 2.x (v2.7.8).
- [spring-boot-3x](https://github.com/christoferson/spring-boot-3x): Spring Boot 3.x — Java 17, Jakarta EE 9, GraalVM Native Image.
- [spring-boot-3x-openapi-3](https://github.com/christoferson/spring-boot-3x-openapi-3): Spring Boot 3.x with OpenAPI 3.

### AWS SDKs & Services

- [aws-sdk-java-v2](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-java-v2): AWS SDK Java Version 2.
- [aws-sdk-java](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-java): AWS SDK Java Version 1.
- [aws-cognito-java-spring](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-cognito-java-spring): AWS Cognito Authentication using Java Spring OAuth2.
- [aws-batch-docker-java](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-batch-docker-java): AWS Batch Basic Docker Java Example.
- [aws-batch-docker-java-demo](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-batch-docker-java-demo): AWS Batch Docker Java with AWS SDK Demo.
- [aws-ecs-java-spring-boot](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-ecs-java-spring-boot): AWS ECS Basic Docker Spring Boot Example.
- [aws-sdk-js-v2-browser](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-js-v2-browser): AWS SDK JavaScript Version 2.
- [aws-sdk-js-v3-browser-blank](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-js-v3-browser-blank): AWS SDK JavaScript Version 3 Blank Project.
- [aws-sdk-python-boto3](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-python-boto3): AWS SDK Python Boto3.
- [aws-sagemaker](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sagemaker): AWS SageMaker.
- [aws-cognito-userpool](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-cognito-userpool): AWS Cognito UserPool Demo.
- [aws-cognito-client-js](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-cognito-client-js): AWS Cognito Client JS.
- [aws-lambda-java](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-lambda-java): AWS Lambda Java.
- [aws-lambda-python](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-lambda-python): AWS Lambda Python.
- [aws-lambda-python-layer](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-lambda-python-layer): AWS Lambda Python Layer.
- [aws-lambda-codes](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-lambda-codes): AWS Lambda Codes.
- [aws-lambda-powertools-java](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-lambda-powertools-java): AWS Lambda Powertools (Java).
- [aws-sam](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sam): AWS SAM.
- [aws-sam-java](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sam-java): AWS SAM Java.
- [aws-sam-nodejs](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sam-nodejs): AWS SAM Node.js.
- [aws-sdk-node](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-sdk-node): AWS SDK Node.js.
- [aws-xray-docker-java-demo](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-xray-docker-java-demo): AWS X-Ray Docker Demo.
- [aws-codeartifact-maven](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-codeartifact-maven): AWS CodeArtifact Maven.
- [aws-codeartifact-maven-lib](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-codeartifact-maven-lib): AWS CodeArtifact Maven Library.
- [aws-deepracer](https://github.com/christoferson/aws-deepracer): AWS DeepRacer.

| Domain              | Technologies                                              |
|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| AI / GenAI          | AWS Bedrock, Strands Agents, MCP, LangChain, Chainlit     |

| DevOps              | Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS SAM, CloudFormation           |
| Data / ML           | SageMaker, Scikit-learn, Kaggle, Boto3                    |
| Languages           | English, Japanese (JLPT N1), Chinese (HSK 4), Tagalog     |
